Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF extends AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.OrderedCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF,T>
Type Parameters:
SELF - the concrete check type (for fluent chaining)
T - the temporal value type (must be Comparable)
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<SELF,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
InstantCheck, LocalDateCheck, LocalDateTimeCheck, OffsetDateTimeCheck, ZonedDateTimeCheck
public abstract class AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF extends AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>> extends OrderedCheck<SELF,T>
Base class for temporal check types. Extends OrderedCheck to inherit comparison methods, and adds temporal-specific assertions (before/after) with time-oriented error messages.
